'''jagoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wadmoll|wadmoll]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-g-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wadmoll|wadmoll]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jagoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jægeseth|jægeseth]] || [[word:jægesej|jægesej]] || [[word:jægesesh|jægesesh]] || [[word:jægese|jægese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jagogosoth|jagogosoth]] || [[word:jagogosoj|jagogosoj]] || [[word:jagogososh|jagogososh]] || [[word:jagogoso|jagogoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jagosoth|jagosoth]] || [[word:jagosoj|jagosoj]] || [[word:jagososh|jagososh]] || [[word:jagoso|jagoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jagofsoth|jagofsoth]] || [[word:jagofsoj|jagofsoj]] || [[word:jagofsosh|jagofsosh]] || [[word:jagofsof|jagofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jagosotho|jagosotho]] || [[word:jagosojo|jagosojo]] || [[word:jagososho|jagososho]] || [[word:jagosoko|jagosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jagosoth|jagosoth]] || [[word:jagosoj|jagosoj]] || [[word:jagososh|jagososh]] || [[word:jagoso|jagoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jagosothol|jagosothol]] || [[word:jagosojol|jagosojol]] || [[word:jagososhol|jagososhol]] || [[word:jagosokol|jagosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jagosothotho|jagosothotho]] || [[word:jagosojojo|jagosojojo]] || [[word:jagososhosho|jagososhosho]] || [[word:jagosoko|jagosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jagosothon|jagosothon]] || [[word:jagosojon|jagosojon]] || [[word:jagososhon|jagososhon]] || [[word:jagosokon|jagosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jagosothoro|jagosothoro]] || [[word:jagosojoro|jagosojoro]] || [[word:jagososhoro|jagososhoro]] || [[word:jagosokoro|jagosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
